---
name: Specification Change
about: Propose a normative or structural change to the OpenPAKT specification
title: "[Spec Change] "
labels: spec, design, proposal
---

## Summary

Provide a concise summary of the proposed specification change.

---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this change is solving.

Include details such as:

- what is unclear, missing, or inconsistent in the current specification
- why the current behaviour or wording is insufficient
- which users, tools, or workflows are affected

---

## Specification Section Affected

Identify the part of the specification impacted by this change.

Examples:

- report schema
- finding taxonomy
- severity model
- scenario format
- CI policy semantics

---

## Proposed Change

Describe the exact change being proposed.

Include, where applicable:

- schema changes
- field definitions
- normative wording
- validation rules
- expected consumer / producer behaviour

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe alternative approaches that were considered and why they were not chosen.

---

## Compatibility Impact

Describe how this change affects compatibility.

Choose one and explain:

- Backward compatible
- Additive but requires version note
- Breaking change

---

## Examples

Provide example JSON, YAML, or Markdown snippets if relevant.

```json
{
  "schema_version": "0.1",
  "findings": []
}
